title: Senior Software Engineer - IBM India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - IBM India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
IBM India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
